title: Long Boats
body:
![long boat picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bacc8d67ea77c8068d69fb0691d33d7795eef018.png)

# LONG BOATS!!

This new resource pack made by Elequacity Studios makes boats 2 times longer!
![The Long Boat™](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94a4809f9ac95b34fba4f84a96c9d646d2b4df9f.png)

This can be useful for kayak-like boats.

idk i thought they looked cool.

REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR EMF (ENTITY MODEL FEATURES)
